title: Stage 08 Deploy Gate
description: Stage 8 (Deploy) gate. Authored by dev-platform after running the selected adapter. PASS requires status PASS AND runbook_referenced true. The adapter-specific result lives in an additional 'adapter_result' object; see .devteam/adapters/<adapter>.md for its shape.

pm_signoff.description: Carried forward from Stage 7; included here so the deploy gate is self-contained.

deploy_requested.description: Confirms the user wanted Stage 8 to run (i.e. didn't stop after sign-off).

runbook_referenced.description: Re-checked at Stage 8 start; a missing runbook ESCALATEs (does not FAIL) so the user can fill it in and resume.
